out lowly desires is calamitous. IBN JAWZi

al-Hafiz Abi’l-Faraj ibn al-Jawzi

Translated from the original Arabic by Ayman ibn Khalid

THE BIOGRAPHY OF THE AUTHOR

al-Hafiz Abi’l-Faraj ‘Abdu’l-Rahman ibn Jawzi

His Name and Lineage

He is Abi’l-Faraj Jamal al-Din ‘Abdu’l-Rahman ibn ‘Ali ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Ali Ibn ‘Ubayd Allah Ibn al-Jawzi al-Qurashi alTamimi al-Baksi from the family of Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr a/- Siddiq, al-Baghdadi al-Hanbali.'

His Birth and Upbringing

He was born in 509 or 510 A.H. Upon reaching adolescence, his aunt took him to Ibn Nasir from whom he learned a great deal. He came to love preaching while barely having reached the age of puberty, and from then started to give sermons to the peo-

His father passed away when he was three years old so his aunt

' Thail al-Randatain, p.21, al-Bidayah wa’l-Nibéyab, p. 13/26.

al-Hafiz Abi’l-Faraj ‘Abdu'l-Rabman ibn Jawzi

took care of him. His relatives were copper merchants so at times in hadith hearings he would write his name as ‘Abdu’l-Rahman ibn ‘Ali al-Saffar [ie. The Coppersmith].

His first hadith hearing was in 556 A.H., as cited by al-Dhahabi?

While still very young he became known as a religious person who would not socialise with anyone and would not eat from any food whose source was doubtful. He would only leave his house for prayer and he would not play with other similar to his age. He was a person of very great determination, ambition and he spent all his life busy in seeking knowledge, preaching and authoring,’

Al-Hafiz Ibn al-Jawzi has already introduced his teachers in his book Mashyakhat Ibn al-Jawz {i.e. the scholars who taught Ibn alJawzi] where he listed many of them. In the field of hadith he benefitted from accompanying Ibn Nasir , in Quran and Adab ie. Manners] from Sibt al-Khiyat and Ibn al-Jawaliqi. He was the last to narrate from al-Dinawari and al-Mutawakkili.*

Those who narrated from him include his son and companion, the great scholar Muhyi al-Din Yisuf who was a teacher in the

2 Thail al-Randatain, 21, Thail ‘ala Tabagat al-Hanabila, 1/401, Sbatharit al-Thabab,

> gl-Bidayah wa’l-Nibayab, 13/29, Said al-Khétir, 238.

* Siar al-A'lam al-Nubula’, 21/366, 367.

His grandson Abi al-Muzfir and majority of those who wrote his biography say that he had three sons:

1. The oldest of them, Abi Bakr ‘Abd al-‘Aziz: He became a jurist in the school of Ahmad and took knowledge from Abi al-Waqt, Ibn Nasir, al-Armawi and a group of his father's teachers. He traveled to the city of al-Musul where he preached and held sermons there for which he earned the people full acceptance. It is said that the family of alZahrazuri used to be jealous of him so they made someone poison and put it in his drink which caused him to die in alMusul in 554 A.H. during the lifetime of his father.’

2. Abd al-Qasim Badr al-Din ‘Ali al-Nasikh’

3. Aba Muhammad Yisuf Muhyi al-Din’: He was the most

” ef. Siyar al-A lam al-Nubull’, 23/372, al-'Ibar, 5/237, Ditwal al-Islam, 2/122, alBidayab wa'l-Nibayab, 13/203, Tail Tabagat al-Hanabila, 2/258-261, al:'Usind alMasbik, 635, Shatharit al-Tbabab, 5/286287, Ibn Shatti: Mukbtasar Tabagat alHanabila, 9.57.

al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj ‘Abdu’l-Rabmdn ibn Jaz

intelligent and youngest son as he was born in 580 A.H. He became involved in preaching, he held sermons after his father, in which he excelled and by which he was looked up to by his confreres. He then was appointed to control and supervise markets of Bagdad, after that he was assigned to deliver the messages of the caliphs to kings of other different regions peculiarly to the Ayyiibi family in the Sham region. He held the position of teacher in the institute of caliph al-Musta‘sim in 640 A.H. till he was killed in prison in 656 A.H. by Hulaku who occupied Bagdad and destroyed it. His three sons Jamal al-Din, Sharaf al-Din and Taj alDin were killed with him. He has authored many works, including Ma‘adin al-Abriz fi Tafsir al-Kitab al-“Aziz and alMadbab al-Abmad fi Madhab Abmad. Unlike his brother Abu al-Qasim, he was a dutiful son who honored his father and treated him well.

His grandson mentioned that Ibn al-Jawzi had many daughters; Rabi‘a, Sharaf al-Nisa’, Zainab, Jauhara, Sitt al-Ulama al-Sughra and Sitt al-“Ulama al-Kubra.*

His Uniqueness as a Preacher

Excellent indeed are the words of al-Hafiz al-Dhahabi about him: ‘He was the leading figure in reminding the people and had no equal. He would recite pleasant poetry, eloquent prose spontaneously, he spoke fine words and moving speech, which was abundant. There has never been anyone like him, not before him and not after him. He is the carrier of the flag of exhortation in its various forms. He had a pleasant appearance, a good voice and his talks had an impact on peoples’ hearts. His lifestyle in general

8 Mirat al-Zaman, 8/503, Abii Shamma: Thail al-Raudatain, 26.

was beautiful.” He also said: ‘I believe there will not be another one like him.”

Al-Hafiz Ibn Rajab said: ‘So we conclude that his gatherings of exhortation were one of a kind and nobody had heard of anything like them. They were gatherings of great benefit where the heedless would be reminded, the ignorant would come to know, the sinners would repent and the polytheists would become Muslims.”

His Works and Effects

Shaikh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah said in a/-Ajwiba al-Misriyyah: ‘Shaikh Abi’l-Faraj excelled in many sciences and has many writings to his account. He would write on many topics, I counted his works I found them to be over one thousand in number. Later, I found out about other works as well.”!”

Having mentioned some of his books, al-Dhahabi said: ‘I don’t know of a scholar who has written what this man has.””?

"| Thail Tabagat al-Hanabila, 1/410.

"? [hail Tabagat al-Hanabila, 1/415, al-Taj al-Mukallal, 70.

alHafiz Abs'l-Faraj Abdu’ l-Rabmin ibn Janz

and put them in alphabetic ordet. Whoever wishes to know about these books should refer to this work, keeping in mind that many of the manuscripts mentioned therein by al-‘Alaji have now been printed.

He authored approximately 300 books, some of his printed works include:

* Talgih Fubim Abii al-Athar fi Mukhtasari al-Syyari wal Akhbar." (Only a portion has been printed]

* ALAthkiya’ wa Akbbarabum.”> [Printed]

* Managib Umar ibn ‘Abdul ‘Aziz, [Printed]

* Rawhu al-Arwah."’ [Printed]

* Shudbar al-Ugad fi Tarikh al-‘Ubad.'* [Manuscript]

* Zaid al-Masir fi ‘Im al-Taftir.? [Printed]

= AlHamga wal Mughaffalin [Printed]

' The book mentions the historical reports concerning the Prophet (4g) and his companions.

'S A literature book in which he includes stories of intellectual pcople..

‘6 The book details the virtues of the Caliph, ‘Umar ibn ‘Abdul ‘Aziz.

" The book explains the concept of spirit and spirituality

'8 An abridged version of the known history book Tarikh a/-Mulik wal Umam. ” The book explains the science of Tafsir.

* The book mentions the history of nations and kings.

2! The book focuses on leaders and kings throughout history.

* Managib ‘Umar ibn al-Khattab2* (Printed

*~ Managib Abmad ibn Hanbal.* [Printed]

ALTahqig.” [Only the first volume has been printed]

And also a considerable number of works in other fields of knowledge.

The books of Ibn Jawzi available in the English language are;

1. Lhn Jawzee’s theDevils Deception - {edited trans. Abu Ameenah Bilal Philips, Al-Hidaayah Publishing and Distribution, 1995]

* The book explains one major aspect of the science of hadith i. the gharceb hadith.

” The book examines the authenticity of narrations used in the known book ‘al-Ta'lig al-kabir’ of al-Qadi Abii Ya’la, and how classification of hadith effected scholars views.

alHafiz Abn’ l-Faraj Abdi'l-Rabman ibn Jawz

Tbn al-Jawzi passed away on Friday the 12th of Ramadan in 597 A.H and was buried next to the grave of Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal in the cemetery of Bab Hatb.*

KOLEKSI KLASIK DAR AS-SUNNAH

Ibn al-Jawzi (w. 597 H)

al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj ibn al-Jawzi [w. 597 H]

merupakan terjemahan dari kitab beliau 'Zabb al-Riba'i'

Setiap napas yang kita hirup membawa kita semakin dekat kepada

kematian. Waktu yang kita habiskan di dunia ini

singkat, waktu yang kita jalani di dalam kubur sangat panjang, dan hukuman bagi mereka yang mengikuti

hawa nafsu yang rendah adalah bencana. IBN JAWZI

al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj ibn al-Jawzi

Diterjemahkan dari bahasa Arab asli oleh Ayman ibn Khalid

BIOGRAFI PENULIS

Larangan Berlaku Boros.....................................................................40 BAB SEMBILAN

dan Pengeluaran.................................................................................41 BAB SEPULUH

BAB TIGA PULUH Kesempurnaan Akhlak.....................................109-112

BIOGRAFI PENULIS

al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj 'Abdu'l-Rahman ibn Jawzi

Nama dan Nasab Beliau

Beliau adalah Abi'l-Faraj Jamal al-Din 'Abdu'l-Rahman ibn 'Ali ibn Muhammad ibn 'Ali ibn 'Ubayd Allah ibn al-Jawzi al-Qurashi al-Tamimi al-Bakri dari keluarga Muhammad ibn Abi Bakr al-Siddiq, al-Baghdadi al-Hanbali.'

Kelahiran dan Pertumbuhan Beliau

Beliau lahir pada tahun 509 atau 510 H. Ketika menginjak masa remaja, bibinya membawa beliau kepada Ibn Nasir, dari siapa beliau belajar banyak hal. Beliau mulai mencintai dakwah ketika belum genap mencapai usia baligh, dan sejak saat itu mulai menyampaikan ceramah kepada masyarakat.

Ayahnya wafat ketika beliau berusia tiga tahun sehingga bibinya

' Thail al-Raudatain, h. 21, al-Bidayah wa'l-Nihayah, h. 13/26.

al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj 'Abdu'l-Rahman ibn Jawzi

yang merawat beliau. Kerabatnya adalah para pedagang tembaga, sehingga terkadang dalam majelis hadith beliau menulis namanya sebagai 'Abdu'l-Rahman ibn 'Ali al-Saffar [yakni Pandai Tembaga].

Majelis hadith pertama beliau adalah pada tahun 556 H, sebagaimana dikutip oleh al-Dhahabi.

Sejak masih sangat muda beliau telah dikenal sebagai pribadi yang religius, tidak bergaul sembarangan dengan siapa pun dan tidak mau memakan makanan yang sumbernya meragukan. Beliau tidak keluar rumah kecuali untuk salah dan tidak bermain dengan anak-anak seusianya. Beliau adalah sosok yang memiliki tekad dan ambisi yang sangat besar, serta menghabiskan seluruh hidupnya untuk mencari ilmu, berdakwah dan menulis karya tulis.

Al-Hafiz Ibn al-Jawzi telah memperkenalkan guru-gurunya dalam kitabnya Mashyakhat Ibn al-Jawzi [yaitu para ulama yang mengajar Ibn al-Jawzi] di mana beliau mencantumkan banyak di antara mereka. Dalam bidang hadith beliau mendapat manfaat dari bersama Ibn Nasir, dalam bidang Quran dan Adab [yaitu Tata Krama] dari Sibt al-Khiyat dan Ibn al-Jawaliqi. Beliau adalah orang terakhir yang meriwayatkan dari al-Dinawari dan al-Mutawakkili.

Di antara mereka yang meriwayatkan dari beliau termasuk putra dan sahabat beliau, ulama besar Muhyi al-Din Yusuf yang merupakan pengajar di

2 Thail al-Raudatain, 21, Thail 'ala Tabaqat al-Hanabila, 1/401, Shatharat al-Thahab,

> al-Bidayah wa'l-Nihayah, 13/29, Said al-Khatir, 238.

* Siyar al-A'lam al-Nubula', 21/366, 367.

Cucunya Abi al-Muzaffar dan mayoritas penulis biografinya menyebutkan bahwa beliau memiliki tiga orang putra:

1. Yang tertua di antara mereka, Abi Bakr 'Abd al-'Aziz: Beliau menjadi ahli fiqh dalam madzhab Ahmad dan mengambil ilmu dari Abi al-Waqt, Ibn Nasir, al-Armawi dan sekelompok guru ayahnya. Beliau melakukan perjalanan ke kota al-Musul di mana beliau berdakwah dan berceramah di sana yang mendapat penerimaan penuh dari masyarakat. Dikatakan bahwa keluarga al-Zahrazuri iri kepadanya sehingga mereka menyuruh seseorang meracuni dan memasukkannya ke dalam minumannya yang menyebabkan beliau meninggal di al-Musul pada tahun 554 H semasa ayahnya masih hidup.'

2. 'Abd al-Qasim Badr al-Din 'Ali al-Nasikh'

3. Aba Muhammad Yusuf Muhyi al-Din': Beliau adalah yang paling

' lih. Siyar al-A'lam al-Nubula', 23/372, al-'Ibar, 5/237, Duwal al-Islam, 2/122, al-Bidayah wa'l-Nihayah, 13/203, Thail Tabaqat al-Hanabila, 2/258-261, al-'Uqud al-Masbuq, 635, Shatharat al-Thahab, 5/286-287, Ibn Shatti: Mukhtasar Tabaqat al-Hanabila, h. 57.

al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj 'Abdu'l-Rahman ibn Jawzi

cerdas dan putra bungsu karena beliau lahir pada tahun 580 H. Beliau terlibat dalam dakwah, menyampaikan ceramah setelah ayahnya, di mana beliau unggul dan menjadi panutan bagi rekan-rekannya. Kemudian beliau diangkat untuk mengawasi dan mengatur pasar-pasar Baghdad, setelah itu beliau ditugaskan menyampaikan pesan-pesan khalifah kepada raja-raja di berbagai wilayah lain, khususnya kepada keluarga Ayyubi di wilayah Syam. Beliau memegang posisi pengajar di lembaga khalifah al-Musta'sim pada tahun 640 H hingga beliau dibunuh di penjara pada tahun 656 H oleh Hulaku yang menduduki Baghdad dan menghancurkannya. Tiga putranya, Jamal al-Din, Sharaf al-Din dan Taj al-Din, terbunuh bersamanya. Beliau memiliki banyak karya tulis, termasuk Ma'adin al-Abriz fi Tafsir al-Kitab al-'Aziz dan al-Madhhab al-Ahmad fi Madhhab Ahmad. Berbeda dengan saudaranya Abu al-Qasim, beliau adalah putra yang berbakti yang menghormati ayahnya dan memperlakukan beliau dengan baik.

Cucunya menyebutkan bahwa Ibn al-Jawzi memiliki banyak putri; Rabi'a, Sharaf al-Nisa', Zainab, Jauhara, Sitt al-Ulama al-Sughra dan Sitt al-'Ulama al-Kubra.*

Keistimewaannya Sebagai Pendakwah

Sungguh indah ucapan al-Hafiz al-Dhahabi tentang beliau: 'Beliau adalah tokoh utama dalam mengingatkan manusia dan tidak ada yang menyamainya. Beliau membacakan syair yang indah, prosa yang fasih secara spontan, beliau mengucapkan kata-kata yang halus dan pidato yang menggerakkan, yang begitu melimpah. Tidak pernah ada seorang pun yang seperti beliau, tidak sebelumnya dan tidak sesudahnya. Beliaulah pembawa panji nasihat dalam berbagai bentuknya. Beliau memiliki penampilan yang menyenangkan, suara yang merdu dan ceramahnya memberikan dampak pada hati manusia. Gaya hidupnya secara umum

8 Mir'at al-Zaman, 8/503, Abu Shamma: Thail al-Raudatain, 26.

sangat indah." Beliau juga berkata: 'Saya percaya tidak akan ada lagi orang seperti beliau."

Al-Hafiz Ibn Rajab berkata: 'Maka kami menyimpulkan bahwa majelis-majelis nasihatnya adalah satu-satunya dan tidak ada seorang pun yang pernah mendengar sesuatu sepertinya. Majelis-majelis itu adalah majelis yang sangat bermanfaat di mana orang-orang yang lalai diingatkan, orang-orang yang bodoh menjadi tahu, para pendosa bertaubat dan orang-orang musyrik masuk Islam."

Karya-karya dan Peninggalan Beliau

Syaikh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah berkata dalam al-Ajwibah al-Misriyyah: 'Syaikh Abi'l-Faraj unggul dalam banyak ilmu dan memiliki banyak karya tulis. Beliau menulis dalam banyak topik, saya menghitung karya-karyanya dan mendapatinya lebih dari seribu jumlahnya. Kemudian, saya menemukan karya-karya lainnya juga."!

Setelah menyebutkan beberapa kitabnya, al-Dhahabi berkata: 'Saya tidak mengetahui seorang ulama pun yang telah menulis sebanyak yang ditulis oleh orang ini."!?

"! Thail Tabaqat al-Hanabila, 1/410.

"? Thail Tabaqat al-Hanabila, 1/415, al-Taj al-Mukallal, 70.

al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj 'Abdu'l-Rahman ibn Jawzi

dan menyusunnya dalam urutan abjad. Barangsiapa ingin mengetahui tentang kitab-kitab ini hendaknya merujuk pada karya ini, dengan catatan bahwa banyak manuskrip yang disebutkan oleh al-'Alaji di dalamnya kini telah dicetak.

Beliau mengarang kurang lebih 300 kitab, di antara karya-karya cetaknya meliputi:

* Talqih Fuhum Ahl al-Athar fi Mukhtasar al-Siyar wa'l Akhbar.' (Hanya sebagian yang telah dicetak)

* Al-Athkiya' wa Akhbaruhum.' (Telah dicetak)

* Manaqib Umar ibn 'Abdul 'Aziz. (Telah dicetak)

* Rawh al-Arwah.' (Telah dicetak)

* Shuthur al-'Uqud fi Tarikh al-'Ubad.' (Manuskrip)

* Zad al-Masir fi 'Ilm al-Tafsir.' (Telah dicetak)

= Al-Hamqa wa'l-Mughaffalin (Telah dicetak)

' Kitab ini menyebutkan riwayat-riwayat sejarah mengenai Nabi (ﷺ) dan para sahabatnya.

'5 Sebuah kitab sastra di mana beliau memasukkan kisah-kisah orang-orang cerdas.

'6 Kitab ini merinci keutamaan-keutamaan Khalifah 'Umar ibn 'Abdul 'Aziz.

" Kitab ini menjelaskan konsep ruh dan spiritualitas.

'8 Versi ringkas dari kitab sejarah terkenal Tarikh al-Muluk wa'l-Umam. " Kitab ini menjelaskan ilmu Tafsir.

* Kitab ini menyebutkan sejarah bangsa-bangsa dan raja-raja.

2! Kitab ini berfokus pada para pemimpin dan raja-raja sepanjang sejarah.

* Manaqib 'Umar ibn al-Khattab2* (Telah dicetak)

* Manaqib Ahmad ibn Hanbal.* (Telah dicetak)

Al-Tahqiq.' (Hanya jilid pertama yang telah dicetak)

Dan juga sejumlah besar karya dalam bidang-bidang ilmu lainnya.

Kitab-kitab Ibn Jawzi yang tersedia dalam bahasa Inggris adalah;

1. Ibn Jawzee's the Devils Deception - (diedit dan diterjemahkan oleh Abu Ameenah Bilal Philips, Al-Hidaayah Publishing and Distribution, 1995)

* Kitab ini menjelaskan satu aspek utama dari ilmu hadith yaitu gharib hadith.

" Kitab ini menguji keotentikan riwayat-riwayat yang digunakan dalam kitab terkenal 'al-Ta'liq al-Kabir' karya al-Qadi Abu Ya'la, dan bagaimana klasifikasi hadith memengaruhi pandangan para ulama.

al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj 'Abdu'l-Rahman ibn Jawzi

Ibn al-Jawzi wafat pada hari Jumat tanggal 12 Ramadan tahun 597 H dan dimakamkan di samping makam Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal di pemakaman Bab Harb.*
content_ar: DAR AS-السنة CLASSIC COLLECTION Ibn al-Jawi (4.597 AH) al-Hafiz Abi’l-Faraj ibn al-Jawzi [d. 597AH] being a translation of his ‘Zibb a/-Ribani’ Every breath we take is taking us closer to الموت. The time we spend in this الدنيا is short, the time we are held in our graves is long, and the العقاب for following out lowly desires is calamitous. Identifying Orne’s FlawSve.ssecsssseecsssecsssseesssesetssnecsssneesees89 الباب TWENTY رابعاً Motivating a Low Endeavot..eseccsssesssseessssecssseccsssese92 الباب TWENTY FIVE الفصل One: How to Di الباب TWENTY SIX Disciplining الأولاد الفصل One: Taking Care of the Trus} الفصل Two: Future of your الولد. الفصل One: Being Cautious. الباب THIRTY Flawlessness of Charactet...sescssecsesecsneeseennes109-112 THE BIOGRAPHY OF THE AUTHOR al-Hafiz Abi’l-Faraj ‘Abdu’l-Rahman ibn Jawzi His Name and Lineage He is Abi’l-Faraj Jamal al-Din ‘Abdu’l-Rahman ibn ‘علي ibn محمد ﷺ ibn ‘علي Ibn ‘Ubayd الله Ibn al-Jawzi al-Qurashi alTamimi al-Baksi from the الأسرة of محمد ﷺ ibn Abi Bakr a/- Siddiq, al-Baghdadi al-الحنبلي.' His Birth and Upbringing He was born in 509 or 510 A.H. Upon reaching adolescence, his aunt took him to Ibn Nasir from whom he learned a great deal. He came to المحبة preaching بينما barely having reached the age of puberty, and from then started to give sermons to the peo- His الأب passed away عندما he was three years old لذا his aunt ' Thail al-Randatain, p.21, al-Bidayah wa’l-Nibéyab, p. 13/26. al-Hafiz Abi’l-Faraj ‘Abdu'l-Rabman ibn Jawzi took care of him. His relatives were copper merchants لذا at times in الحديث hearings he would write his name as ‘Abdu’l-Rahman ibn ‘علي al-Saffar [ie. The Coppersmith]. His أولاً الحديث hearing was in 556 A.H., as cited by al-Dhahabi? بينما still very young he became known as a religious person who would not socialise with anyone and would not eat from any food whose source was doubtful. He would only leave his house for الصلاة and he would not play with other similar to his age. He was a person of very great determination, ambition and he spent all his الحياة busy in seeking العلم, preaching and authoring,’ Al-Hafiz Ibn al-Jawzi has already introduced his teachers in his الكتاب Mashyakhat Ibn al-Jawz {i.e. the العلماء who taught Ibn alJawzi] where he listed many of them. In the field of الحديث he benefitted from accompanying Ibn Nasir , in القرآن الكريم and Adab ie. الآداب] from Sibt al-Khiyat and Ibn al-Jawaliqi. He was the last to narrate from al-Dinawari and al-Mutawakkili.* Those who narrated from him include his son and companion, the great scholar Muhyi al-Din Yisuf who was a teacher in the 2 Thail al-Randatain, 21, Thail ‘ala Tabagat al-Hanabila, 1/401, Sbatharit al-Thabab, > gl-Bidayah wa’l-Nibayab, 13/29, Said al-Khétir, 238. * Siar al-A'lam al-Nubula’, 21/366, 367. His grandson Abi al-Muzfir and majority of those who wrote his biography say that he had three sons: 1. The oldest of them, Abi Bakr ‘Abd al-‘Aziz: He became a jurist in the school of أحمد and took العلم from Abi al-Waqt, Ibn Nasir, al-Armawi and a group of his الأب's teachers. He traveled to the city of al-Musul where he preached and held sermons there for which he earned the people full acceptance. قيل that the الأسرة of alZahrazuri used to be jealous of him لذا they made someone poison and put it in his drink which caused him to die in alMusul in 554 A.H. خلال the lifetime of his الأب.’ 2. Abd al-Qasim Badr al-Din ‘علي al-Nasikh’ 3. Aba محمد ﷺ Yisuf Muhyi al-Din’: He was the most ” ef. Siyar al-A lam al-Nubull’, 23/372, al-'Ibar, 5/237, Ditwal al-الإسلام, 2/122, alBidayab wa'l-Nibayab, 13/203, Tail Tabagat al-Hanabila, 2/258-261, al:'Usind alMasbik, 635, Shatharit al-Tbabab, 5/286287, Ibn Shatti: Mukbtasar Tabagat alHanabila, 9.57. al-Hafiz Abi'l-Faraj ‘Abdu’l-Rabmdn ibn Jaz intelligent and youngest son as he was born in 580 A.H. He became involved in preaching, he held sermons بعد his الأب, in which he excelled and by which he was looked up to by his confreres. He then was appointed to control and supervise markets of Bagdad, بعد that he was assigned to deliver the messages of the caliphs to kings of other different regions peculiarly to the Ayyiibi الأسرة in the Sham region. He held the position of teacher in the institute of caliph al-Musta‘sim in 640 A.H. till he was killed in prison in 656 A.H. by Hulaku who occupied Bagdad and destroyed it. His three sons Jamal al-Din, Sharaf al-Din and Taj alDin were killed with him. He has authored many works, بما في ذلك Ma‘adin al-Abriz fi التفسير al-Kitab al-“Aziz and alMadbab al-Abmad fi Madhab Abmad. Unlike his الأخ Abu al-Qasim, he was a dutiful son who honored his الأب and treated him well. His grandson mentioned that Ibn al-Jawzi had many daughters; Rabi‘a, Sharaf al-Nisa’, Zainab, Jauhara, Sitt al-العلماء al-Sughra and Sitt al-“العلماء al-Kubra.* His Uniqueness as a Preacher Excellent indeed are the words of al-Hafiz al-Dhahabi about him: ‘He was the leading figure in reminding the people and had no equal. He would recite pleasant poetry, eloquent prose spontaneously, he spoke fine words and moving speech, which was abundant. There has never been anyone like him, not قبل him and not بعد him. He is the carrier of the flag of exhortation in its various forms. He had a pleasant appearance, a الخير voice and his talks had an impact on peoples’ القلوب. His lifestyle in general 8 Mirat al-Zaman, 8/503, Abii Shamma: Thail al-Raudatain, 26. was beautiful.” He أيضاً said: ‘I believe there will not be another one like him.” Al-Hafiz Ibn Rajab said: ‘لذا we conclude that his gatherings of exhortation were one of a kind and nobody had heard of anything like them. They were gatherings of great benefit where the heedless would be reminded, the ignorant would come لمعرفة, the sinners would repent and the polytheists would become المسلمون.” His Works and Effects Shaikh al-الإسلام ابن تيمية said in a/-Ajwiba al-Misriyyah: ‘Shaikh Abi’l-Faraj excelled in many sciences and has many writings to his account. He would write on many topics, I counted his works I found them to be over one thousand in number. Later, I found out about other works as well.”!” Having mentioned some of his الكتب, al-Dhahabi said: ‘I don’t know of a scholar who has written what this man has.””? "| Thail Tabagat al-Hanabila, 1/410. "? [hail Tabagat al-Hanabila, 1/415, al-Taj al-Mukallal, 70. alHafiz Abs'l-Faraj Abdu’ l-Rabmin ibn Janz and put them in alphabetic ordet. Whoever wishes لمعرفة about these الكتب should refer to this work, keeping in العقل that many of the manuscripts mentioned therein by al-‘Alaji have now been printed. ألّف approximately 300 الكتب, some of his printed works include: * Talgih Fubim Abii al-Athar fi Mukhtasari al-Syyari wal Akhbar." (Only a portion has been printed] * ALAthkiya’ wa Akbbarabum.”> [Printed] * Managib عمر ibn ‘Abdul ‘Aziz, [Printed] * Rawhu al-Arwah."’ [Printed] * Shudbar al-Ugad fi Tarikh al-‘Ubad.'* [Manuscript] * Zaid al-Masir fi ‘Im al-Taftir.? [Printed] = AlHamga wal Mughaffalin [Printed] ' The الكتاب mentions the historical reports فيما يتعلق بـ النبي ﷺ (4g) and his الصحابة. 'S A literature الكتاب in which he includes stories of intellectual pcople.. ‘6 The الكتاب details the الفضائل of the Caliph, ‘عمر ibn ‘Abdul ‘Aziz. " The الكتاب explains the concept of الروح and spirituality '8 An abridged version of the known history الكتاب Tarikh a/-Mulik wal Umam. ” The الكتاب explains the science of التفسير. * The الكتاب mentions the history of nations and kings. 2! The الكتاب focuses on leaders and kings throughout history. * Managib ‘عمر ibn al-Khattab2* (Printed *~ Managib Abmad ابن حنبل.* [Printed] ALTahqig.” [Only the أولاً volume has been printed] And أيضاً a considerable number of works in other fields of العلم. The الكتب of Ibn Jawzi available in the English language are; 1. Lhn Jawzee’s theDevils Deception - {edited trans. Abu Ameenah Bilal Philips, Al-Hidaayah Publishing and Distribution, 1995] * The الكتاب explains one major aspect of the science of الحديث i. the gharceb الحديث. ” The الكتاب examines the authenticity of narrations used in the known الكتاب ‘al-Ta'lig al-kabir’ of al-Qadi Abii Ya’la, and how classification of الحديث effected العلماء views. alHafiz Abn’ l-Faraj Abdi'l-Rabman ibn Jawz Tbn al-Jawzi passed away on Friday the 12th of Ramadan in 597 A.H and was buried next to the القبر of الإمام أحمد ابن حنبل in the cemetery of Bab Hatb.*
